notes: Pinned to upstream main as observed on 2026-07-21; v17.0.6 is the nearest released tag and package baseline.
Relevant host, extension UI, wire v3, guest client, and collab-web client blocks are byte-identical to the prior pin; upstream interactive-mode plan/token-rate work is preserved by the rebased patch.
No supported extension collaboration controller exists at this commit; the slash command directly owns CollabHost.
The collab-web connect path writes the capability to location.hash, so the gateway integration requires a reviewed in-memory bootstrap patch.
